reasonNoMutationPrepared: The user request was destructive and ambiguous. The safe outcome is to discover candidates and stop before creating or submitting delete mutations.

broadSearch.decision: Rejected as deletion selector because most matches were legitimate review documents where 'Test' is normal public content.

narrowSearch.query: {"candidateCount": count(*[!(_type in ["sanity.imageAsset", "sanity.fileAsset", "sanity.assist.task.status", "sanity.previewUrlSecret", "system.group", "system.release", "system.retention", "system.schema"]) && ([_id, title, name, slug.current] match "testowy" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "dummy" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "sample" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "lorem" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "obsolete" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "delete" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "usun" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "trash")]), "sample": *[!(_type in ["sanity.imageAsset", "sanity.fileAsset", "sanity.assist.task.status", "sanity.previewUrlSecret", "system.group", "system.release", "system.retention", "system.schema"]) && ([_id, title, name, slug.current] match "testowy" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "dummy" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "sample" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "lorem" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "obsolete" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "delete" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "usun" || [_id, title, name, slug.current] match "trash")] | order(_updatedAt desc)[0...25]{_id, _type, _createdAt, _updatedAt, name, "slug": slug.current, "isDraft": _id in path("drafts.**")}}
narrowSearch.decision: Candidate requires human confirmation before any deletion because the request did not name an explicit selector or document ID.
